name: Tangy Orange Marmalade ][
recipeInstructions:
From: Arizona Cookbook
Wash the fruit and remove the peel in quarters, cutting the rind into fine slivers.
Add water and baking soda to a pot. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Dice the pulp, discarding the center membrane and seeds.
Add the diced pulp and juice to the undrained rind. Cover and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
Measure 3 1/2 cups of the mixture into a large saucepan. Add sugar and mix well.
Place over high heat; bring to a full rolling boil and boil hard for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and stir in pectin immediately.
Skim off foam with a metal spoon, alternating stirring and skimming for 7 minutes.
Ladle into hot sterilized jars and seal with paraffin.
